name: hero-city-reference-ui
description: Verify the supplied Hero City image is the live sprite source for HUD icons, action buttons, shop cards, tabs, notifications, Armory nameplates, and the world shop billboard.

steps.label: wait for supplied Hero City art

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local id="rbxassetid://104014193600358" local sign=root["Fist Shop Sign"] local signImages,signDecals=0,0 for _,d in ipairs(sign:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("ImageLabel") and d.Image==id then signImages+=1 elseif d:IsA("Decal") and d.Texture==id then signDecals+=1 end end local nameplateIcons=0 for _,name in ipairs({"Boxing Glove","Iron Knuckle","Thunder Fist","Titan Gauntlet"}) do local plate=root.Polish["City Decor"][name.." Armory Nameplate"] for _,d in ipairs(plate:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("ImageLabel") and d.Image==id then nameplateIcons+=1 end end end return H:JSONEncode({signImages=signImages,signDecals=signDecals,nameplateIcons=nameplateIcons,theme=sign:GetAttribute("Theme")})

steps.label: world Armory uses supplied Hero City image

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD g:SetAttribute("AutomationTab","Fists") task.wait(.35) local id="rbxassetid://104014193600358" local function read(parent,name) local d=parent:FindFirstChild(name,true) return d and string.format("%d,%d,%d,%d",d.ImageRectOffset.X,d.ImageRectOffset.Y,d.ImageRectSize.X,d.ImageRectSize.Y) or "" end local old=0 local current=0 for _,d in ipairs(g:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("ImageLabel") then if d.Image=="rbxassetid://134314320646796" then old+=1 elseif d.Image==id then current+=1 end end end local banner=g.GameMenu.Content:FindFirstChild("Hero City Generated Banner") local boxing=g.GameMenu.Content:FindFirstChild("Street Boxing Fist",true) local titan=g.GameMenu.Content:FindFirstChild("Titan Siege Fist",true) return H:JSONEncode({currentEnough=current>=20,old=old,power=read(g.StatsPanel:FindFirstChild("Power",true),"StatIcon"),punch=read(g.MobileControls.ActionPunch,"ActionIcon"),train=read(g.MobileControls.ActionTrain,"ActionIcon"),settings=read(g.GameMenu.Tabs.SettingsTab,"TabIcon"),banner=read(g.GameMenu.Content,"Hero City Generated Banner"),boxing=boxing and read(boxing,"ProductIcon") or {},titan=titan and read(titan,"ProductIcon") or {}})

steps.label: HUD and shop crop the supplied sprite regions
